# The Governance Benchmark

> The Kenshiki Governance Benchmark (KGB) is the public benchmark for AI governance properties. It measures whether a model's reasoning can be governed — whether it stays within evidence, attributes correctly, follows instructions, and abstains when it should. Open methodology, open-source runner, cryptographically signed reports, continuously-updated leaderboard.

## Top-level pages

- [The Governance Benchmark](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/): The public benchmark for AI governance properties. The yardstick the industry argues about.
- [Specifications](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/specs): The four KGB specifications — methodology, runner, leaderboard governance.

## Methodology specifications

- [KGB Executive Summary v0.1](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/specs/exec-summary): One-page methodology overview: what KGB measures, how evaluations run, conflict-of-interest disclosure.
- [KGB-Public v0.1 — Behavioral Methodology](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/specs/kgb-public): Behavioral probe methodology — EC / SAS / IF / AUC dimensions, multi-judge ensemble, calibration, regulatory mapping.
- [KGB-Structural v0.1 — Artifact Audit Methodology](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/specs/kgb-structural): Artifact-audit methodology — five hard gates, predicate classes, categorical compliance taxonomy.
- [KGB Tool v0.1 — Engineering Reference](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/specs/kgb-tool): Engineering reference for the runner — adapter, multi-judge ensemble, signing chain, canonical DAG-judge prompt template.

## Reports

- [Sample KGB report](https://index.kenshikilabs.com/reports/sample): Realistic mock of a v0.1 signed report — classification, scorecard, attestation chain, replay command.

## Source repository

- [governance-index on GitHub](https://github.com/Kenshiki-Labs/governance-index): the reference Python runner (Apache 2.0), the four MDX methodology specifications, and the TanStack site source.
- [Methodology specs (raw MDX)](https://github.com/Kenshiki-Labs/governance-index/tree/main/docs/specs)
- [Apache 2.0 license](https://github.com/Kenshiki-Labs/governance-index/blob/main/LICENSE)
